properties.description: National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the authoring provider — 10-digit numeric; null if not embedded in note

properties.description: Clinical department or unit (e.g., "Cardiology Outpatient Clinic", "Emergency Department", "2-North Med/Surg")

properties.description: Name of the hospital, clinic, or practice where the note was created

properties.description: Full name of the clinician who ordered the tests

properties.description: NPI of the ordering provider — 10-digit numeric; null if not printed on report

properties.description: Name of the reviewing/verifying pathologist or laboratory director if signed on report. Null if not present

properties.description: Clinical specialty or department of the provider (e.g., "Internal Medicine", "Emergency Medicine", "Orthopedics")

properties.name: Rendering Provider Npi
properties.description: NPI of the actual rendering/treating provider if different from billing provider

properties.name: Service Facility Name
properties.description: Name of the facility where services were rendered (if different from billing provider)

properties.name: Service Facility Npi
properties.description: NPI of the service facility (CMS-1500 Box 32b)

entityTypes.description: A governed episode of assessment, diagnosis, treatment, or follow-up.

properties.name: Note Date
properties.description: Date the note was authored/signed, format YYYY-MM-DD

properties.name: Diagnosis Codes
properties.description: Array of ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes (e.g., ["I10", "E11.9"]). Extract all listed diagnosis pointers

properties.name: Chief Complaint
properties.description: Patient's primary stated reason for visit in their own words or as paraphrased by provider. Free text, maximum 200 characters. Extract the most specific complaint from the "Chief Complaint" or "CC:" label

properties.name: Date Of Service From
properties.description: Start date of service, format YYYY-MM-DD (CMS-1500 Box 24A From)

properties.name: Date Of Service To
properties.description: End date of service, format YYYY-MM-DD (CMS-1500 Box 24A To); same as from if single-day service

properties.name: Follow Up Instructions
properties.description: Specific follow-up instruction text (e.g., "Return to clinic if fever > 101.5°F or worsening symptoms")

properties.name: Follow Up Timeframe
properties.description: Time interval for scheduled follow-up (e.g., "2 weeks", "3 months", "as needed")

properties.name: Icd10 Code
properties.description: ICD-10-CM code (e.g., "I10", "E11.9"). Null if only described without a code

properties.name: Note Type
properties.description: Type of clinical note. One of: Progress | Discharge | Consultation | Admission

properties.name: Objective Vitals
properties.description: Structured object containing vital signs. Extract each of the following sub-fields as a string value (include units). Set to null if not documented:

properties.name: Service Facility Name
properties.description: Name of the facility where services were rendered (if different from billing provider)

properties.name: Service Facility Npi
properties.description: NPI of the service facility (CMS-1500 Box 32b)

properties.name: Subjective Summary
properties.description: Summary of the full Subjective section including history of present illness (HPI), review of systems, and relevant history. Free text, maximum 300 characters. Truncate with ellipsis if longer

entityTypes.label: Healthcare Claim
entityTypes.description: A request for payment for healthcare services.

properties.name: Billed Amount
properties.description: Total amount billed/charged by provider as decimal (CMS-1500 Box 28 or EOB "Billed" column total)

properties.name: Claim Number
properties.description: Unique claim identifier assigned by payer (X12 835 CLM01 or payer-assigned reference number)

properties.name: Denial Reason Code
properties.description: ANSI X12 835 Group/Claim Adjustment Reason Code (CARC) if denied or adjusted (e.g., "96", "CO-4", "PR-1"). Null if claim was fully paid

properties.name: Allowed Amount
properties.description: Payer-allowed/contracted amount as decimal (EOB "Allowed" or "Eligible" amount)

properties.name: Claim Status
properties.description: Adjudication outcome. One of: Paid | Denied | Pending | Adjusted

properties.name: Paid Amount
properties.description: Amount actually paid by payer to provider as decimal (X12 835 BPR02 or EOB "Plan Paid" amount)

properties.name: Patient Responsibility
properties.description: Total amount patient owes (copay + coinsurance + deductible) as decimal

properties.name: Remark Codes
properties.description: Array of Remittance Advice Remark Codes (RARC) associated with the claim (e.g., ["N130", "MA01"]). Null or empty array if none

properties.description: Requested | Approved | Denied | Pending | Partially_Approved | Expired

properties.description: Free-text comments, interpretation notes, or footnotes appended to the report by the laboratory. Maximum 400 characters. Null if none

properties.name: Collection Date
properties.description: Date the specimen was collected from the patient, format YYYY-MM-DD

properties.name: Critical Values Present
properties.description: Boolean — true if ANY result in this report has a Critical (C) flag or is labeled "Critical Value" or "Panic Value" in the report

properties.name: Loinc Code
properties.description: LOINC code if printed on report (e.g., "718-7"); null if not present

properties.name: Received Date
properties.description: Date the specimen was received by the laboratory, format YYYY-MM-DD

properties.name: Reference Range
properties.description: Normal reference range as a string (e.g., "13.5-17.5", "<100", "Negative"). Null if not provided

properties.name: Report Date
properties.description: Date the laboratory report was finalized/issued, format YYYY-MM-DD

properties.name: Result Value
properties.description: The result value as a string (e.g., "14.2", ">1000", "POSITIVE", "RESISTANT")

properties.name: Specimen Type
properties.description: Type of biological specimen tested. One of: Blood | Urine | Swab | CSF | Stool | Sputum | Tissue | Pleural_Fluid | Serum | Plasma | Other

properties.name: Test Name
properties.description: Name of the test as printed on the report (e.g., "Hemoglobin", "Glucose", "Creatinine")

properties.name: Test Results
properties.description: Array of individual test result objects. For each test result line, extract:

properties.name: Client Po Number

properties.name: Client Role

properties.name: Party 1 Name

properties.description: Role of the first party. One of: Disclosing | Receiving | Both (for mutual agreements)

properties.name: Party 2 Name

properties.name: Party 2 Role
properties.description: Role of the second party. One of: Disclosing | Receiving | Both

properties.name: Party 2 State

properties.description: Full name of the plaintiff(s); if multiple, concatenate with "; " separator

properties.description: The state or jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement (e.g., "CA", "NY", "DE", "England and Wales")

properties.name: Arbitration Venue
